zh.Givendale by Ripon, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾吉文代爾 白 利朋
zh.Jacobstow, Cornwall, England: 英國可瓦爾亞可布斯托福
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William de la Warde於大約1160年出生在英國越可爾吉文代爾 白 利朋時，他的父親Lord Simon de Varde31歲，母親Maud Neville27歲。他於1176年與Wilmot Jolliffe在英國可瓦爾亞可布斯托福結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1217年11月3日在英國越可爾享年58歲。

zh-hans.Givendale by Ripon, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾吉文代爾 白 利朋
zh-hans.Jacobstow, Cornwall, England: 英国可瓦爾亞可布斯托福
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William de la Warde于大约1160年出生在英国越可爾吉文代爾 白 利朋时，他的父亲Lord Simon de Varde31岁，母亲Maud Neville27岁。他于1176年与Wilmot Jolliffe在英国可瓦爾亞可布斯托福结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1217年11月3日在英国越可爾享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Warde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Cormac, Donal.

variants.name: Ward
meanings: English: occupational name for a watchman or guard, from Middle English ward ‘watchman, guard’ (Old English weard, used as both an agent noun and an abstract noun).
English: occupational name from Middle English warde ‘armed guard’ (Old English weard ‘watching, guarding’), with the same meaning as 1 above.

Irish: shortened form of McWard, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac an Bhaird ‘son of the poet’. The surname occurs throughout Ireland, where three different branches of the family are known as professional poets.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William de la Warde was born about 1160, in Givendale by Ripon, Yorkshire, England, his father, Lord Simon de Varde, was 31 and his mother, Maud Neville, was 27. He married Wilmot Jolliffe in 1176, in Jacobstow, Cornwall, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 3 November 1217, in Yorkshire, England, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William de la Warde est né environ 1160, à Givendale by Ripon, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Lord Simon de Varde, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Maud Neville, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Wilmot Jolliffe en 1176, à Jacobstow, Cornouailles, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 3 novembre 1217, à Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William de la Warde um 1160 in Givendale by Ripon, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Simon de Varde 31 und seine Mutter Maud Neville 27. Er hat 1176 in Jacobstow, Cornwall, England Wilmot Jolliffe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 3. November 1217 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de la Warde è nato il circa 1160 nel Givendale by Ripon, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Lord Simon de Varde, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Maud Neville, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Wilmot Jolliffe nel 1176, nel Jacobstow, Cornwall, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 3 novembre 1217, nel Yorkshire, England, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William de la Wardeが約1160年にイギリスヨークシュアイアギベンダル ビー リプオンで生まれた時，父Lord Simon de Vardeは31歳，母Maud Nevilleは27歳であった。1176年にイギリスコルンワルジャコブストウでWilmot Jolliffeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1217年11月3日にイギリスヨークシュアイアで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William de la Warde(이)가 대략 1160년 영국 요르크실르 지븐데일 비 리폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Simon de Varde(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud Neville(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1176년 영국 코른월 재컵스타우에서 Wilmot Jolliffe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1217년 11월 3일 영국 요르크실르에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de la Warde nasceu aproximadamente 1160, em Givendale by Ripon, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord Simon de Varde, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Maud Neville, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Wilmot Jolliffe em 1176, em Jacobstow, Cornwall, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 3 de novembro de 1217, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William de la Warde родился около 1160 г. в местности гивендеил би рипон, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Lord Simon de Varde было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Maud Neville, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Wilmot Jolliffe в 1176 г. в местности джакобстоу, корнвалл, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 3 ноября 1217 г. в местности еркшир, Англия в возрасте 58 лет.

sm.from 1199 to 1216: mai le 1199 e o'o I le 1216

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William de la Warde nació aproximadamente 1160, en Givendale by Ripon, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Lord Simon de Varde, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Maud Neville, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Wilmot Jolliffe en 1176, en Jacobstow, Cornwall, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 3 de noviembre de 1217, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 58 años.
